0.text: Free effusion in the right pleural space up to 35 mm in the deepest part

1.text: Free effusion in the left pleural space up to 26 mm in the deepest part

2.text: Areas of increased density consistent with consolidation with air bronchograms in both lung parenchyma adjacent to the effusion

3.text: Areas of increased density in a centrilobular ground glass pattern in both lung parenchyma

4.text: Uniform interlobular septal thickening in both lung parenchyma
